data.intent: User wants to see the historical price trend and total return of the asset QQ over a ten-year period.

decomposition.sub_question: What is the price trend of QQ over the last 10 years?
decomposition.title: 10-Year Price History
decomposition.description: Displays the historical price movement of QQ over the last decade.

decomposition.sub_question: What is the total return of QQ over the last 10 years?
decomposition.title: 10-Year Total Return
decomposition.description: Shows the cumulative percentage return of QQ over the 10-year period.
